pr.title: Record: 5-expert Hedge Mixer + TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.0745)

output.summary: GPU-vectorized 5-expert Hedge context mixer during TTT blends neural logits with incremental n-gram and entropy experts for post-training adaptation.
techniques: Hedge-based logistic mixer combining neural log-softmax, unigram/bigram/trigram buckets, and entropy confidence
Score-first sliding-window TTT with frozen early layers, Polyak averaging, and AdamW chunked training
GPTQ calibration followed by full int5 quantization within the 600s budget
